title: Krümelchencraft
description: This modpack optimizes Minecraft for weaker PCs and enables the use of shaders.
body:
## The modpack was created for the Krümelchencraft SMP server.


This modpack is designed to enhance the performance of  Minecraft while also making it shader-friendly. It is perfect for players on lower-end computers or those who want to experience Minecraft with beautiful graphics.

### Features:
- A collection of performance-boosting mods that optimize the game without sacrificing too much visual quality
- Support for shaders
- A focus on stability and compatibility to ensure a smooth and enjoyable experience

### Recommended for:
- Players on lower-end computers
- Players who want to use shaders without sacrificing performance
- Players who want a more streamlined and optimized Minecraft experience
